abrigo.description: Convex hedges for Colombian wage-earners — ∂²Π gamma
abrigo.mission: Abrigo designs and deploys permissionless convex-hedge instruments targeting the macro-risk exposure of Colombian wage earners. The ∂²Π gamma structure — second partial derivative of the payoff — delivers convex protection against COP/USD depreciation, CPI surprises, and labor-market shocks without requiring leverage or speculation.
abrigo.headline: Abrigo — ∂²Π gamma
abrigo.dashboard_body: Once contracts are deployed, this page will show live on-chain protocol state: active instruments, hedge parameters, and risk metrics.
abrigo.github_body: Documentation and contract addresses will be published here once the app is ready and contracts are live.
